name: Instant Pot Coconut Chicken Curry
description: A from-scratch coconut chicken curry built on an onion-tomato-ginger-garlic masala, finished with full-fat coconut milk and lime. Dairy-free and gluten-free.
recipeIngredient: 1 cup tomato puree (canned, or 2 blended tomatoes)
1 pound boneless skinless chicken thighs, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 teaspoon Kashmiri red chili powder (or paprika)
recipeInstructions: Set Instant Pot to Sauté and heat. Add ghee, then cumin seeds; sizzle 30 seconds.
Add onion, ginger, and garlic. Sauté about 3 minutes until onions are golden.
Add tomato puree and all ground spices. Sauté 2-3 minutes.
Add chicken; stir and sauté 3-4 minutes to build flavor.
Add water and stir, scraping the bottom. Cancel Sauté, seal the lid, and set the vent to sealing.
Pressure cook on high for 4 minutes, then quick-release.
Stir in coconut milk and garam masala; simmer on Sauté 4-5 minutes until thickened.
Stir in lime juice and garnish with cilantro. Serve over basmati rice or with naan.
